title: Cara Electric Shower - 9.5kW Black (Perluso, Seville, Enrich, Madrid 2, Alicante)
features: Multiple Cable and water entry points
Easy to clean, single spray pattern shower head
Outlet product - 2 year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)
Will replace Triton Perluso, Madrid 2, Forte, Cara, Castano, Seville, Rapide 2 Plus, Rapide 3 Plus, Rapide R1, Amber 3, Ivory 2
description: The Cara shower is one of our biggest selling showers, offering excellent value for money. It's easy to use, with separate power and temperature controls. The shower comes with multiple cable and water entry points on both sides of the unit, making this a great replacement product. Plumbing System: Cold Mains Minimum Running Pressure/Flow Required: 1 Bar @ 8 l/min Maximum Static Pressure: 10 Bar
